name: update_task
description: Update an existing ClickUp task by its task ID. You can modify the name, description, status, priority, assignees (add or remove), due date, time estimate, and archived state. Only the fields you include in the request body will be changed.

parameters.name: task_id
parameters.description: The ID of the task to update.

parameters.name: description
parameters.example: Updated mockup based on stakeholder feedback.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: New status for the task. Must match an existing status in the list.

parameters.name: priority
parameters.description: New priority: 1 = Urgent, 2 = High, 3 = Normal, 4 = Low, null = No priority.

parameters.name: assignees
parameters.description: Object with 'add' and 'rem' arrays of user IDs to add or remove from assignments.

parameters.name: due_date
parameters.description: New due date as a Unix timestamp in milliseconds.

parameters.name: archived
parameters.description: Set to true to archive the task.
